title: Šibenik Transfers | Fixed Prices to Split, Zadar, Dubrovnik & Zagreb | TAXI Antonio
description: Šibenik transfers to and from Split, Zadar, Dubrovnik, Zagreb, Trogir and beyond. Fixed prices, private door to door, one local driver. Book directly with Antonio.
keywords: sibenik transfers, šibenik transfer, taxi sibenik split, sibenik to zadar, sibenik to dubrovnik, sibenik to zagreb

mainEntity.name: How much is a taxi transfer from Šibenik to Split?

acceptedAnswer.text: A private transfer from Šibenik to Split is a fixed 140 euros per car for up to 4 passengers, with tolls, fuel and luggage included.
Yes. Every city-to-city transfer is a fixed price per car for up to 4 passengers, agreed upfront. No meter and no surprises.

mainEntity.name: Is the transfer private or shared?

acceptedAnswer.text: Every transfer is private and door to door, in a Škoda Superb. There is no vehicle sharing and no extra stops unless you ask for them.

mainEntity.name: Can you stop along the way?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes. On longer transfers I am happy to stop for a coffee, a photo or a quick sight. Just let me know when booking and I will factor it in.

mainEntity.name: How do I pay for a transfer?

acceptedAnswer.text: A 20% advance payment (minimum 20 euros) confirms the booking, by bank transfer or card. The balance is paid to the driver on the day, in cash or by card.
